title: Evangelion Alls Right with The World Doujin
display_title: Evangelion Alls Right with The World Doujin
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion All's Right with The World Doujin             Quote Post by NoAltRealities » Mon Apr 23, 2018 8:09 am Look, I just want to read this scene in it's full where Shinji has a clone and it ruins everything for everyone.it stuffs Shinji in a trash can, wears Asuka's dress, ties her up. And idk what else happens. And I cannot find it anywhere:( https://ifunny.co/fun/xHKGhm0i5?s=cl

[]: Re: Evangelion All's Right with The World Doujin             Quote Post by Blockio » Mon Apr 23, 2018 12:56 pm Huh... reverse image search doesnt give anything useful either

[]: Re: Evangelion All's Right with The World Doujin             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Apr 23, 2018 1:20 pm Weren't those official comic anthologies? I thought there was another one called God's in His Heaven. But I haven't seen them around in years so I can't find much about them currently.

[]: Re: Evangelion All's Right with The World Doujin             Quote Post by NoAltRealities » Mon Apr 23, 2018 1:34 pm There's gotta be a scan SOMEWHERE on the internet. I'm sure there is. Or at the very least someone who owns the comic or knows where I can access it

[]: Re: Evangelion All's Right with The World Doujin             Quote Post by AR-99 » Fri Apr 27, 2018 8:38 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Weren't those official comic anthologies? I thought there was another one called God's in His Heaven. But I haven't seen them around in years so I can't find much about them currently.

[]: Re: Evangelion All's Right with The World Doujin             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Apr 28, 2018 11:42 am I could've sworn I had a copy of God's in His Heaven , but it's up in storage (if I still have it) so I have no way to currently skim it I definitely remember seeing at least partial scans of both back in 2009-2010, so I'm a little shocked if they've been totally lost with time. (I'm assuming they must've been on THAT BOARD or what have you?)

[]: Re: Evangelion All's Right with The World Doujin             Quote Post by DarkBluePhoenix » Sat Apr 28, 2018 2:25 pm If we had a different title for this (like the comic's title) it may help things along in searching the internet for the whole thing. Cause searching " God's in His Heaven" hasn't yielded anything useful, just a bunch of NERV emblems and reddit stuff

[]: Re: Evangelion All's Right with The World Doujin             Quote Post by Zeruss » Mon Apr 30, 2018 3:20 pm My own search hasn't been that fruitful. Most I've found of the specific Shinji comic were three pages of its pages that were shared in a thread at this very forum and idenfitied by SSD back then, too. I've found many physical copies of the anthology itself being sold everywhere, but no single digital trace of any of its contents (besides the already available material and the cover). All I was ble to find is what appears to be an index with the title & artists of each comic within said anthology--Maybe the actual comic's title or its artist could be recognized from that list? I haven't been able to find anything using the artist's names nor the comic's titles, though. There might be a chance that the comic itself was reprinted in another entirely different compilation/anthology (as many other Eva comics were at the time), and then got translated by mere chance without being part of its original context--Only way to find out, I'm afraid, would be to scan through the entire english translated database of Eva doujins available ( specially at that one site that has many old Eva doujins ), and try to find it through plain ol' eye scanning.

[]: Re: Evangelion All's Right with The World Doujin             Quote Post by DarkBluePhoenix » Mon Apr 30, 2018 3:55 pm ^ a proverbial needle in a haystack conundrum...

[]: Re: Evangelion All's Right with The World Doujin             Quote Post by AR-99 » Fri Jun 01, 2018 10:26 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: I could've sworn I had a copy of God's in His Heaven , but it's up in storage (if I still have it) so I have no way to currently skim it

[]: Re: Evangelion All's Right with The World Doujin             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Jun 03, 2018 5:31 pm Aha. Mystery solved on my end (Thank you for double-checking! )

[]: Re: Evangelion All's Right with The World Doujin             Quote Post by DarkBluePhoenix » Thu Jun 07, 2018 8:17 pm AR-99 wrote: Just checked my PMs and you sold me a copy in 2012.

[]: Re: Evangelion All's Right with The World Doujin             Quote Post by AR-99 » Sun Jun 17, 2018 7:58 pm Going back to Zereus' link , this is the story: 「招かざる適任者」by 林堂昇. It's 12 pages and goes from p. 43-54. Here's the 1st page: SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Evangelion All's Right with The World Doujin             Quote Post by DarkBluePhoenix » Sun Jun 17, 2018 8:30 pm ^ I can't read Japanese, but I can bet it's hilarious

[]: Re: Evangelion All's Right with The World Doujin             Quote Post by AR-99 » Tue Jun 19, 2018 9:53 pm And for the Ritsuko fans, she is in a maid outfit.

[]: Re: Evangelion All's Right with The World Doujin             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Jun 20, 2018 11:31 pm Seeing the picture jogged my memory: Shinji clones were running amok (one of 'em captured Asuka ) and the real Shinji was at a complete loss on what to do + blamed for everything! I think the punch line was they all ended up in some spare Reiquarium tanks (including real Shinji? ). Was very funny stuff! Also: That link by Zeruss further reminded me how damn silly Photobucket's current policies are....Sigh.
